This glittering, opulent yet strikingly rebellious outfits show what it truly means to be a flapper. Bold, fashionable, and indulgent - all at the same time.
Featuring shimmering pink scallops of monumental, Art Deco design, cut just enough for the ankles to be shown in full force.
Step into the speakeasy in this dress and show the world who you are - a truly free spirit.

Part of HOR's Roaring Twenties Collection
